name: ex_vibeeng
prompt: Minimalist digital illustration on a pure dark background (#1A1A2E). Flat vector style with soft gradients. Limited color palette: electric blue (#7AB8F5), teal (#2EC4B6), amber (#F39C12), white (#FFFFFF). Clean geometric shapes, no text, no watermarks, no photorealism. Ample negative space. Professional and modern aesthetic, suitable for tech conference projection. A person at a desk with a glowing laptop, this time with a structured blueprint beside them and a checklist floating in the air. Code streams flow from the screen but pass through a filter/gate of teal light. Test tubes with green checkmarks float nearby. Symbolizes disciplined AI-assisted development. No text, no letters, no words, no labels, no watermarks. 16:9 aspect ratio. Dark background #1A1A2E.
